name: Five Flavor Pound Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together margarine and shortening until smooth.
2. Gradually add sugar, beating well after each addition.
3. Beat in eggs one at a time, mixing thoroughly after each.
4. In a separate bowl, combine flour with baking powder.
5. Alternately add milk and the flour mixture to the creamed mixture, beginning and ending with the liquid ingredients. Mix until just combined.
6. Stir in the flavorings (rum extract, vanilla extract, coconut extract, lemon-flavored extract, and butter flavoring).
7. Pour batter into a greased 10-inch tube pan or loaf pan, level off the top.
8. Bake at 325°F for 1 1/2 hours, or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
9. Remove from oven and cool completely on a wire rack.
10. Prepare glaze by dissolving sugar in water over medium heat. Stir in remaining flavorings until smooth.
GLAZE:
- Dissolve 1 cup granulated sugar in 1/2 cup boiling water.
- Stir in 1/2 tsp rum extract, 1/2 tsp vanilla extract, 1/2 tsp coconut extract, 1/2 tsp lemon-flavored extract, and 1/2 tsp butter flavoring until smooth.
